checks.title: No untargeted facial recognition scraping
checks.description: Detect web scraping or CCTV feed ingestion combined with face detection for building facial recognition databases.

checks.title: No social scoring
checks.description: Detect systems that score individuals based on social behaviour for access decisions across unrelated contexts.

checks.title: No workplace/education emotion recognition
checks.description: Detect emotion recognition or sentiment analysis deployed in employee monitoring or educational testing contexts.

checks.title: No subliminal manipulation
checks.description: Detect manipulative AI techniques targeting vulnerable individuals or exploiting age, disability, or socio-economic situation.

checks.title: Risk management documentation exists
checks.description: Declared risk_management document path exists and is non-empty.

checks.title: Risk management covers required sections
checks.description: Document contains sections for risk identification, estimation, evaluation, and mitigation.

checks.title: CI/CD evaluation gates present
checks.description: CI/CD configuration includes evaluation gates that can block deployment based on model quality metrics.

checks.title: Data governance documentation exists
checks.description: Declared data_governance document path exists and is non-empty.

checks.title: Documentation references actual data sources
checks.description: Data governance document references data sources or datasets found in the codebase.

checks.title: GDPR cross-reference present
checks.description: If regulations includes 'gdpr', data governance documentation addresses GDPR implications.

checks.title: Technical documentation exists
checks.description: Declared technical_docs document path exists and is non-empty.

checks.title: Documentation covers Annex IV requirements
checks.description: Technical documentation covers the nine Annex IV categories: general description, design specs, development process, monitoring, performance metrics, risk management, lifecycle changes, standards, and intended purpose.

checks.title: Logging infrastructure detected
checks.description: Structured logging or audit logging package detected in the codebase (e.g. @systima/aiact-audit-log, Winston with structured format, Pino).

checks.title: @systima/aiact-audit-log integration
checks.description: The @systima/aiact-audit-log package is installed and configured with appropriate middleware on AI call paths.

checks.title: Logging coverage across AI call sites
checks.description: All detected AI API call sites have associated logging instrumentation.

checks.title: Transparency documentation exists
checks.description: Declared transparency document path exists and is non-empty.

checks.title: Model cards or capability documentation present
checks.description: Model card files or structured capability/limitation documentation found in the repository.

checks.title: Human oversight documentation exists
checks.description: Declared human_oversight document path exists and is non-empty.

checks.title: Human oversight patterns in code
checks.description: Code paths include human-in-the-loop gates (approval steps, review queues, override mechanisms) before automated decisions take effect.

checks.title: Kill-switch or halt mechanism
checks.description: System includes a mechanism for oversight persons to intervene in or halt the system's operation.

checks.title: Test suites for AI components
checks.description: Test files or test directories covering AI component behaviour are present in the repository.

checks.title: Input validation on AI endpoints
checks.description: Input validation or sanitisation present before AI model invocation.

checks.title: Monitoring and alerting configuration
checks.description: Monitoring, drift detection, or alerting configuration present for AI components.

checks.title: FRIA documentation exists
checks.description: If operator_role is 'deployer' or 'both', declared FRIA document path exists and contains required sections per Article 27(1).

checks.title: AI interaction disclosure present
checks.description: User-facing code includes AI disclosure mechanisms for systems that interact directly with natural persons.

checks.title: AI-generated content marking
checks.description: AI-generated content output includes machine-readable provenance markers (C2PA, watermarking, metadata headers).

checks.title: Post-market monitoring documentation
checks.description: Declared post_market_monitoring document path exists and describes monitoring dimensions.

checks.title: Monitoring pipeline present
checks.description: Drift detection, accuracy monitoring, or alerting pipelines configured for AI components.
